rail.title: Dovetail
rail.sub: The master leads — cut in with questions anytime.

xrHandoff.title: Your turn — the joint floats above your workbench.
xrHandoff.body: Put on the headset: a hologram guides you step by step through laying out, sawing and chopping — right on the real wood.

offlineTrust.title: Runs fully on this device — built to be offline-proof
offlineTrust.full: Runs locally · not a byte leaves the device

diagram.svgTitle: Dovetail joint — the top and bottom boards interlock
diagram.rangeLabel: Pull the joint apart or push it together
diagram.stateLocked: ▸ Locked: the wedge-shaped pins hold without glue.
diagram.stateApart: ▸ Apart: each pin fits into the gap in the other board.
